title: Evaluation Contract
description: Schema for evaluation contracts that define capability checks, reasoning dimensions, and evidence requirements for workflow testing. Hardened in Plan 06: evaluation_config required with 4 sub-fields, additionalProperties: false at root and metadata.

workflow_id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow under test (e.g., 'skill-vrs-audit', 'agent-vrs-attacker').

category.description: Category of the workflow being evaluated.

rule_refs.description: References to stable rule IDs from the rules registry (e.g., 'EXEC-INTEGRITY', 'GROUND-TRUTH').

capability_checks.description: Specific capabilities to verify during evaluation.

reasoning_dimensions.description: Trajectory dimensions to assess in the workflow (e.g., 'graph_utilization', 'evidence_quality').

evidence_requirements.description: Types of evidence the workflow must produce.

grader_type.description: Overall grading approach for this evaluation contract.

evaluation_config.description: Evaluation pipeline configuration for this contract. All 4 sub-fields are required.

run_gvs.description: Whether to run Graph Value Scoring.

run_reasoning.description: Whether to run LLM reasoning evaluation.

debate_enabled.description: Whether to enable evaluator debate protocol for this workflow.

run_mode.description: Override default run mode for this contract (tier default if absent).

debrief_wait_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for debrief response before dead-agent detection.

debrief_layer_weight.description: Weight for debrief layer in scoring (0.0-1.0, default 1.0).

hooks.description: Claude Code hook lifecycle events this contract requires.

status.description: Contract authoring status: active (fully authored) or stub (template-derived placeholder).

coverage_axes.description: Coverage radar axes this contract contributes to (e.g., 'vulnerability_class', 'semantic_operation').

ground_truth_rubric.description: Prose describing expected reasoning process steps. MUST describe process, NOT detection outcomes. Core contracts SHOULD include this.

active_dimensions.description: Whitelist of dimension names to evaluate for this contract. Unlisted dimensions default to applicable=False.

metadata.description: Additional context for the evaluation. evaluation_depth is DEPRECATED — use evaluation_config.depth instead.

model_tier.description: Default model tier for this workflow.

description.description: Human-readable description of what to verify.
